use_cases: Display user profile information with a compact avatar that expands on hover to reveal full details
Showcase team member cards in a clean, interactive format on company about pages
Create social media-style user cards with bio and action buttons
Build contact cards that reveal additional information on interaction
Implement user mentions with hover previews in comment threads or chat interfaces
ai_summary: An interactive avatar profile card component that displays a compact user avatar which expands on hover to reveal full profile details including name, username, description, and a customizable action button. Features multiple visual variants (default, glass, bordered) and size options, built with Framer Motion for smooth reveal animations. Perfect for SaaS applications, social platforms, and creator tools requiring elegant user profile displays.
